summary: Completed comprehensive testing of glassmorphism + liquid glass theme overhaul for PortfolioHealth Advisor. All visual changes verified, custom logo visible across all pages, and all core functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with glassmorphism theme - glass header, liquid background blobs, glass cards
Custom logo visible in hero section
Two CTA cards (Quick Check and Full Assessment) visible and clickable with glass styling
Login page loads with 3D liquid glass shapes on left side
Glass input fields on login page with proper styling
Gradient Sign In button (btn-liquid class) works correctly
Dashboard page loads with floating glass sidebar
Quick Assessment flow: intro page with glass form
Quick Assessment: 15 questions with progress bar and glass option buttons
Quick Assessment: results page with radar chart and traffic light indicators
Companies page: Add company dialog opens with glass styling and form works
Assessments page: glass table with assessment list
Assessments page: New Assessment dialog opens with glass styling and form works
Logout button works in sidebar - redirects to login page
seed_data_creation: Created test companies and quick assessments during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Glassmorphism theme overhaul complete. Key CSS classes: glass-surface, glass-card, glass-surface-highlight, glass-input, btn-liquid, btn-glass. Liquid background blobs rendered globally in App.js. Custom logo URL: https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/ad26f002-f220-4b9d-b343-979dba7f2367/images/6407f98124d827501f865028cbbf81566506fd19a8f17f5fd5b271241d491414.png

visual_verification.landing_page: Glass header, liquid background blobs, two CTA cards with glass styling, custom logo in header and hero
visual_verification.login_page: 3D liquid glass shapes on left, glass input fields, gradient Sign In button
visual_verification.dashboard: Floating glass sidebar with logo, glass stat cards, glass surface highlight elements
visual_verification.quick_assessment: Glass form elements, progress bar, glass option buttons, results with radar chart
visual_verification.companies_page: Glass company cards, glass dialog for adding companies
visual_verification.assessments_page: Glass table, glass dialog for new assessments
